generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR sensor for 3D point cloud generation"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR_PointCloudData
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for RGB-D imaging"
    DTDFVocab:producedData IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera_FeedsData
]

instance SpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed sensor measuring current speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering angle sensor measuring current steering angle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR_PointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera_FeedsData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance VehicleStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data from Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR_PointCloudData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkPointCloudProcessing, NVIDIAJetpack50SDK
]

instance DepthCameraFeedsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "RGB-D camera feeds from Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera"
    DTDFVocab:fromData IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera_FeedsData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkPointCloudProcessing, NVIDIAJetpack50SDK
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed measurement data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDataStorage, ROS2Middleware
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Steering angle measurement data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDataStorage, ROS2Middleware
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Combined vehicle speed and steering angle data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDataStorage
]

instance ClusteredPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Clustered LiDAR points from DBSCAN algorithm"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR_PointCloudData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Python38
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Tracked objects with position and velocity data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR_PointCloudData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Python38
]

instance DBSCANModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN algorithm for clustering LiDAR point clouds"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkPointCloudProcessing
]

instance KalmanFilterModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for object tracking using sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Python38
]

instance ISO15622ACCControlStrategy : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622 adaptive cruise control strategy implementation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CppCompiler
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack50SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for AI and deep learning on Jetson platforms"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ThreeDVisualizationService, ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for communication between vehicle components"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService, ThreeDVisualizationService
]

instance MATLABSimulinkPointCloudProcessing : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for LiDAR point cloud processing and analysis"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ThreeDVisualizationService
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for scripting and data processing tasks"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance CppCompiler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ compiler for high-performance vehicle control applications"
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance SQLDataStorage : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database for storing vehicle state and object track data"
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportGenerationService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time UI for monitoring vehicle state, object tracks, and driving path"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateInsight, ObjectTracksInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloads adaptive cruise control computation to digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCComputationOffload
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for enabling/disabling ACC, setting desired speed, and emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction, DisableACCAction, SetDesiredSpeedAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3D visualization of vehicle surroundings and object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:provides ThreeDSceneVisualization
]

instance ReportGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates human-readable reports for operational insights"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateReport
]

instance VehicleStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Human-readable report of current vehicle speed and steering angle"
]

instance ObjectTracksInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Human-readable report of detected objects and their tracks"
]

instance ThreeDSceneVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time 3D visualization of LiDAR and camera data"
]

instance VehicleStateReport : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detailed report of vehicle state and object tracks for troubleshooting"
]

instance ACCComputationOffload : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Offloaded ACC system computation results"
]

instance EnableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enables adaptive cruise control system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disables adaptive cruise control system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Sets desired speed for adaptive cruise control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Triggers emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance MotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor actuator converting desired speed commands into motor voltage commands"
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo actuator adjusting vehicle steering angle"
]

instance JetsonNXComputer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson NX microcomputer for onboard processing"
]

instance JetsonOrinNanoComputer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Orin Nano microcomputer for onboard processing"
]

instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "SQL database for cloud-based data storage"
]

instance VehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains JetsonNXComputer, JetsonOrinNanoComputer, HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera, SpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor, MotorActuator, SteeringServoActuator
]

instance CloudEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains SQLDatabase
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals (desired speed, emergency braking commands) generated by the ACC Controlling FE are converted to motor voltage commands and steering adjustments by the Actuation FE and Steering Servo Actuation FE, respectively."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time operation with end-to-end latency ≤100 ms (per 3GPP TS 22.185) and clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms for event ordering and coordination."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Structured into Physical Twin Entity (sensors/actuators), Digital Twin Entity (ACC, data processing), User Entity (visualization/control), and Cross-System Entity (Data Translation), with data flowing via ROS2 and Wi-Fi."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Design phase (development and troubleshooting by developers) and as operated (vehicle operation and monitoring by operators), supporting digital thread for product lifecycle management."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 for intra-component communication, Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication, latency ≤100 ms per 3GPP TS 22.185."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "On-board NVIDIA Jetson hardware for real-time processing, cloud for Data Storage."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 for reference architecture, ISO 15622 for ACC control strategy."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety considerations include maintaining end-to-end latency of at most 100 ms and clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms for real-time safety-critical operations; security measures are not specified in the document."
]
